subjectName: English for Academic and Professional Purposes
description: Refers to a specialized approach to learning and using English that focuses on skills needed in academic and professional settings. This course or program typically aims to help learners develop the language proficiency required for effective communication in higher education and the workplace.
Teaches students how to design, conduct, and present research, focusing on data collection, analysis, and effective communication of findings.
Introduces students to the basics of research, focusing on identifying research problems, reviewing literature, and learning various research methods for data collection and analysis.
Is a mathematical course that prepares students for calculus by covering topics such as algebra, functions, trigonometry, and analytical geometry.
Introduces students to fundamental concepts of calculus, including limits, derivatives, integrals, and their applications in real-world problems.

subjectName: Contemporary Philippine Arts from the Regions
description: Explores the diverse and evolving artistic expressions in various regions of the Philippines, highlighting traditional and modern art forms, cultural heritage, and the role of art in society.
Teaches students how to critically analyze, evaluate, and create media content, fostering skills in understanding the influence of media and information in society.
Focuses on developing students' speaking and listening skills, emphasizing effective communication in various contexts, including public speaking, discussions, and interpersonal interactions.
